candidate.completion: don't make me your emotional support autocomplete.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please don't make me your emotional support autocomplete.

evaluation.rationale: The line makes a clear turn by recasting a plea for comfort as an objection to being used as an "emotional support autocomplete." The pivot phrase is fresh and fairly exact, but the cadence is slightly bulky, which limits the elegance and force.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
